problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Quantum. Quantum annealing for optimization problems directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
